qa_pairs.question: What should I do before contacting support?
qa_pairs.answer: Before writing to support, consider checking the system status page to see if the problem you're experiencing has already been reported.

qa_pairs.question: Why is it important for my email address to be registered when contacting support?
qa_pairs.answer: It is important because the email address from which you are writing must be registered in your account so that our ticketing system will be able to recognize you automatically.

qa_pairs.question: How does writing a good support question benefit me?
qa_pairs.answer: A well-written question or problem description will likely result in faster and more accurate assistance from our staff.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of email subject lines should I avoid when seeking support?
qa_pairs.answer: Avoid email titles such as "Something is wrong" or "Nothing works", as these will take a long time to resolve because staff will have to ask you to provide missing information.

qa_pairs.question: What should I include in the subject line of my support email?
qa_pairs.answer: In the subject line of the email, include the system or cluster name and a few words describing what may be wrong. For example, "Job 123456 fails to run on the Rorqual cluster".

qa_pairs.question: Should I use an old email thread to ask for help on a new topic?
qa_pairs.answer: No, please do not request help on a different topic as a follow-up to an old email thread. Instead, start a brand new one to avoid re-opening an old ticket.

qa_pairs.question: Which email address should I use for questions about accounts?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions about accounts, please use accounts@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What email address is for questions about account renewals?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions about account renewals, please use renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: To whom should I send questions regarding Globus file transfer services?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions about Globus file transfer services, send an email to globus@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: How do I get support for Cloud resources?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions about using Cloud resources, send an email to cloud@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What is the email address for questions about the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC)?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions about the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC), please send an email to allocations@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: If I have a question specifically about the Trillium cluster, which email should I use?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions or issues regarding the Trillium cluster specifically, please use trillium@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What email address should I use for general support questions not covered by specific categories?
qa_pairs.answer: For any other question or issue not listed, please use support@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What information should I include in my support request to help staff assist me better?
qa_pairs.answer: To help us help you better, please include the cluster name, Job ID, job submission script, file(s) containing error message(s), commands you were executing, software (name and version) you were trying to use, and when the problem happened.

qa_pairs.question: What are the acceptable ways to provide my job submission script in a support request?
qa_pairs.answer: You can provide your job submission script by either giving the full path of the script on the cluster; copying and pasting the script; or attaching the script file.

qa_pairs.question: How should I provide files that contain error messages in my support request?
qa_pairs.answer: You can provide files that contain error message(s) by giving the full path of the file(s); copy and pasting the file(s); or attaching the error message(s) file(s).

qa_pairs.question: Should I send screenshots in my support request?
qa_pairs.answer: Avoid sending screenshots or other large image attachments except when necessary, as the plain text of your commands, job script, etc., is usually more helpful.

qa_pairs.question: How do I grant permission for support staff to access or modify my files or account?
qa_pairs.answer: If you want us to access, copy, or edit your files, or inspect your account and possibly make changes there, say so explicitly in your email. If you have already granted us permission via the CCDB interface, you do not need to do it again.

qa_pairs.question: What is the most important security warning when sending support emails?
qa_pairs.answer: Never send a password!

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum attachment size for support emails?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum attachment size for support emails is 40 MB.
